product.name: Amazon Essentials Women's Mid-Rise Stretchy Skinny Jeans
product.description: Crafted from high-quality stretch denim, these women's skinny jeans provide a flattering, snug fit through the hip, thigh, and leg for a sleek silhouette that suits any occasion. Designed to offer all-day comfort, they come in sizes up to 20, with short, regular, and tall inseam lengths for a customized fit. Featuring authentic five-pocket styling, a zip fly, and a classic shank button closure, these jeans offer endless styling options perfect for dressing up or down. Elevate your wardrobe with versatile jeans that blend comfort, style, and fit.
